nodes.name: Cisticola
nodes.summary: Cisticola（Cisticola）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联53种鸟类，如Whistling cisticola、Chattering cisticola、Trilling cisticola等53种鸟类。

nodes.name: Kilombero cisticola
nodes.summary: The Kilombero cisticola (Cisticola bakerorum) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Tanzania. It was first recognised as new by Éric Burnier in the 1980s. He brought this to the attention of Neil and Liz Baker, who soon confirmed the identity of this species as new to science. It was formally described in 2021 and dedicated to the Bakers. See also List of bird species described in the 2020s References
nodes.shortSummary: The Kilombero cisticola (Cisticola bakerorum) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Tanzania.

nodes.name: Kilombero cisticola
